  "description": "Human Capital Partners (HCP) is a professional services firm specialising in the provision of HR consulting services covering the entire spectrum of the Human Resources value chain. HCP is the successor firm of the erstwhile Executive Selection and Training Services group of KPMG in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Farm Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Job Description


	We are looking for a results-driven Agricultural Economist to manage and oversee operations at a livestock farm in Lagos.


Requirements


	The ideal candidate should have a Degree in Agricultural Economics and hands-on experience in livestock farm management, operations planning, cost control, and productivity improvement.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;sandra.omage@hcp-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Farm Manager Job at Human Capital Partners




        
    

        
        Human Capital Partners (HCP) is a professional services firm specialising in the provision of HR consulting services covering the entire spectrum of the Human Resources value chain. HCP is the successor firm of the erstwhile Executive Selection and Training Services group of KPMG in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Farm Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Description


	We are looking for a results-driven Agricultural Economist to manage and oversee operations at a livestock farm in Lagos.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate should have a Degree in Agricultural Economics and hands-on experience in livestock farm management, operations planning, cost control, and productivity improvement.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
